title: German A1–C1 taxonomy backbone
note: Lightweight CEFR level + grammar-topic reference used to tag generated/imported content. The full day-by-day course wires in later (Phase 6).

levels.title: Foundations
levels.descriptor: Understands and uses familiar everyday expressions and very basic phrases.

levels.title: Everyday Fluency
levels.descriptor: Communicates in simple routine tasks on familiar matters.

levels.title: Independent User
levels.descriptor: Deals with most situations while travelling; describes experiences, opinions, plans.

levels.title: Upper-Intermediate
levels.descriptor: Interacts with fluency and spontaneity; produces clear, detailed text on many subjects.

levels.title: Professional Mastery
levels.descriptor: Uses German flexibly and effectively for professional and academic purposes; produces clear, well-structured, detailed text and expresses views with precision and diplomatic nuance.

structuralSyntaxMatrix.notes: Time adverbs strictly precede location variables (TE-KA-MO-LO rule).

grammarTopics.title: sein & haben
grammarTopics.description: Present tense of the two core verbs sein and haben.

grammarTopics.title: Present tense (regular verbs)
grammarTopics.description: Regular verb conjugation and personal pronouns.

grammarTopics.title: Articles (Nominative)
grammarTopics.description: Definite/indefinite articles and noun gender in the nominative.

grammarTopics.title: Questions & word order
grammarTopics.description: W-questions, yes/no questions, verb in position 2.

grammarTopics.title: Accusative case
grammarTopics.description: Direct objects; masculine der/ein to den/einen.

grammarTopics.title: Negation (nicht / kein)
grammarTopics.description: Difference between nicht and kein.

grammarTopics.title: Possessive articles
grammarTopics.description: mein, dein, sein, ihr, unser, euer.

grammarTopics.title: Plurals & numbers
grammarTopics.description: Noun plural formation and cardinal numbers.

grammarTopics.title: Modal verbs
grammarTopics.description: können, müssen, wollen, möchten; infinitive at the end.

grammarTopics.title: Separable verbs
grammarTopics.description: Separable-prefix verbs in main clauses.

grammarTopics.title: Imperative (basics)
grammarTopics.description: Simple commands and requests.

grammarTopics.title: Prepositions (basic) & es gibt
grammarTopics.description: Common time/place prepositions and es gibt.

grammarTopics.title: Perfekt (introduction)
grammarTopics.description: haben + past participle.

grammarTopics.title: Alphabet & pronunciation
grammarTopics.description: The German alphabet, umlauts (ä/ö/ü), ß, spelling and greetings.

grammarTopics.title: Personal pronouns (Nominative)
grammarTopics.description: Subject pronouns ich, du, er/sie/es, wir, ihr, sie/Sie.

grammarTopics.title: Present tense (stem-changing verbs)
grammarTopics.description: Vowel-changing verbs: fahren→fährt, essen→isst, lesen→liest, sprechen→spricht, nehmen→nimmt.

grammarTopics.title: Likes & preferences (gern, mögen, möchten)
grammarTopics.description: Expressing likes and wishes with gern, mögen and möchten.

grammarTopics.title: Time, clock & dates
grammarTopics.description: Telling the time, days, months and dates.

grammarTopics.title: Coordinating conjunctions
grammarTopics.description: und, aber, oder, denn, sondern; position 0, no change to word order.

grammarTopics.title: Accusative prepositions
grammarTopics.description: durch, für, gegen, ohne, um.

grammarTopics.title: Perfekt with sein
grammarTopics.description: Verbs of movement/change forming the Perfekt with sein.

grammarTopics.title: sein / haben / werden
grammarTopics.description: The three auxiliary/core verbs and position-2 word order.

grammarTopics.title: Modals & Accusative
grammarTopics.description: Modal verbs with accusative objects.

grammarTopics.title: Dative case
grammarTopics.description: Indirect objects and static location; article changes.

grammarTopics.title: Two-way prepositions
grammarTopics.description: Wechselpräpositionen: dative (location) vs accusative (direction).

grammarTopics.title: Pronouns (Akk/Dat)
grammarTopics.description: Personal pronouns in accusative and dative; dative verbs.

grammarTopics.title: Perfekt (full)
grammarTopics.description: haben/sein + participle; sein for change of location/state.

grammarTopics.title: Präteritum (sein/haben/modals)
grammarTopics.description: Simple past of core and modal verbs.

grammarTopics.title: Reflexive verbs
grammarTopics.description: Reflexive pronouns and their position.

grammarTopics.title: Comparative & superlative
grammarTopics.description: Comparison of adjectives and adverbs.

grammarTopics.title: Subordinate clauses (weil/dass/wenn)
grammarTopics.description: Verb-final subordinate clauses.

grammarTopics.title: Imperative (formal/workplace)
grammarTopics.description: Sie-, ihr-, and du-imperatives.

grammarTopics.title: Konjunktiv II (politeness)
grammarTopics.description: würde, könnte, hätte, wäre for polite requests.

grammarTopics.title: Adjective endings (introduction)
grammarTopics.description: Basic attributive adjective declension.

grammarTopics.title: Dative prepositions
grammarTopics.description: aus, bei, mit, nach, seit, von, zu (+ gegenüber).

grammarTopics.title: Demonstrative & indefinite pronouns
grammarTopics.description: dieser/jener, jeder, man, etwas/nichts, einer/keiner.

grammarTopics.title: Time expressions
grammarTopics.description: Temporal prepositions and adverbs: am/im/um, vor/nach, seit/bis.

grammarTopics.title: Local adverbs (wo/wohin/woher)
grammarTopics.description: Position vs direction adverbs; hin and her.

grammarTopics.title: Indirect questions (ob / W-clauses)
grammarTopics.description: Embedded yes/no and W-questions with verb-final order.

grammarTopics.title: Verbs with prepositions
grammarTopics.description: Common verb + preposition combinations (warten auf, denken an).

grammarTopics.title: Ordinal numbers & dates
grammarTopics.description: der erste, am dritten Mai; ordinals and floors/positions.

grammarTopics.title: Adjective declension (all cases)
grammarTopics.description: Endings after definite, indefinite, and zero articles.

grammarTopics.title: Genitive case
grammarTopics.description: Possession and genitive prepositions.

grammarTopics.title: n-Deklination
grammarTopics.description: Weak masculine nouns taking -(e)n.

grammarTopics.title: Relative clauses
grammarTopics.description: Relative pronouns across cases and with prepositions.

grammarTopics.title: Infinitive clauses (zu + Infinitiv)
grammarTopics.description: zu-infinitives; um…zu vs damit.

grammarTopics.title: Temporal clauses
grammarTopics.description: als, wenn, während, bevor, nachdem, seit.

grammarTopics.title: Präteritum (narrative)
grammarTopics.description: Full simple past for narration.

grammarTopics.title: Plusquamperfekt
grammarTopics.description: Past perfect and tense sequencing.

grammarTopics.title: Connectors
grammarTopics.description: deshalb, trotzdem, obwohl, sondern.

grammarTopics.title: Konjunktiv II (full)
grammarTopics.description: Wishes, hypotheticals, past Konjunktiv II.

grammarTopics.title: Passive (Präsens/Präteritum)
grammarTopics.description: werden-passive; passive with modals.

grammarTopics.title: Futur I
grammarTopics.description: werden + infinitive; verbs with prepositions (wo(r)-/da(r)-).

grammarTopics.title: Nominalized adjectives & participles
grammarTopics.description: Adjectives/participles used as nouns: der Neue, etwas Gutes, Angestellte.

grammarTopics.title: Relative clauses with prepositions
grammarTopics.description: Relative pronouns after prepositions; was/wo(r)- relatives.

grammarTopics.title: Purpose clauses (um…zu, damit)
grammarTopics.description: Expressing purpose; um…zu (same subject) vs damit.

grammarTopics.title: Verbs with prepositions & da-/wo-compounds
grammarTopics.description: Fixed verb + preposition; pronominal adverbs darauf, worüber.

grammarTopics.title: Places & directions
grammarTopics.description: nach/zu/in, aus/von; nach Hause vs zu Hause; countries and places.

grammarTopics.title: Reflexive & reciprocal verbs
grammarTopics.description: Reflexive verbs with prepositions; reciprocal einander.

grammarTopics.title: Past Konjunktiv II
grammarTopics.description: hätte/wäre + participle for regrets and missed possibilities.

grammarTopics.title: Passive with modal verbs
grammarTopics.description: muss/kann/soll … + Partizip + werden.

grammarTopics.title: Passive (all tenses) & Zustandspassiv
grammarTopics.description: Full passive system, sein-passive, alternatives.

grammarTopics.title: Participles as adjectives
grammarTopics.description: Partizip I & II as attributes; extended participle constructions.

grammarTopics.title: Konjunktiv I (reported speech)
grammarTopics.description: Indirect speech across tenses.

grammarTopics.title: Subjective modal verbs
grammarTopics.description: sollen/wollen/müssen for hearsay and probability.

grammarTopics.title: Nominalization ↔ Verbalization
grammarTopics.description: Converting between nominal and verbal style.

grammarTopics.title: Word formation
grammarTopics.description: Prefixes, suffixes, compounds.

grammarTopics.title: Genitive prepositions
grammarTopics.description: trotz, während, wegen, aufgrund, (an)statt.

grammarTopics.title: Funktionsverbgefüge
grammarTopics.description: Light-verb constructions.

grammarTopics.title: Two-part connectors
grammarTopics.description: je…desto, sowohl…als auch, entweder…oder, weder…noch.

grammarTopics.title: Cohesion & register
grammarTopics.description: Text cohesion, formal vs informal register, idioms.

grammarTopics.title: Passive alternatives
grammarTopics.description: man, sich lassen, sein + zu + Infinitiv, -bar adjectives.

grammarTopics.title: Extended participle attributes
grammarTopics.description: Erweiterte Partizipialattribute as compact relative clauses.

grammarTopics.title: Futur II (assumptions)
grammarTopics.description: werden + Partizip + haben/sein for completed/assumed events.

grammarTopics.title: Modal particles
grammarTopics.description: doch, mal, ja, halt, eben, wohl and their nuances.

grammarTopics.title: Advanced subordinate clauses
grammarTopics.description: indem, sodass, ohne dass, (an)statt dass, als dass.

grammarTopics.title: Concessive & conditional connectors
grammarTopics.description: falls, sofern, es sei denn, obwohl/obgleich, wenngleich.

grammarTopics.title: Irreal comparison (als ob)
grammarTopics.description: als ob / als wenn / als + Konjunktiv for how things seem.

grammarTopics.title: Adjectives with prepositions
grammarTopics.description: stolz auf, zufrieden mit, interessiert an and similar.

grammarTopics.title: Word order & emphasis
grammarTopics.description: Vorfeld choice, position of nicht, fronting for emphasis.

grammarTopics.title: Collocations & idioms
grammarTopics.description: Common collocations and idiomatic expressions.

grammarTopics.title: Nominalstil & Nominalisierung
grammarTopics.description: Formal nominal register; turning verbal clauses into dense noun phrases (prüfen → die Prüfung der Unterlagen).

grammarTopics.title: Funktionsverbgefüge (professionell)
grammarTopics.description: Professional light-verb constructions: in Betracht ziehen, zur Verfügung stellen, Rücksprache halten, in Frage stellen, in Angriff nehmen.

grammarTopics.title: Erweiterte Partizipialattribute
grammarTopics.description: Partizip I/II as compact pre-nominal attributes that replace relative clauses (die zu prüfenden Unterlagen).

grammarTopics.title: Konjunktiv II (Diplomatie)
grammarTopics.description: Hedging and diplomatic softening: Ich würde vorschlagen, es wäre denkbar, man könnte in Erwägung ziehen.

grammarTopics.title: Konjunktiv I & indirekte Rede
grammarTopics.description: Reported speech for minutes and relaying statements: er sagte, er habe/sei/werde; Ersatzformen with Konjunktiv II.

grammarTopics.title: Subjektive Modalverben
grammarTopics.description: dürfte/müsste/könnte for probability; will/soll for claims and hearsay.

grammarTopics.title: Passiv & Passiversatz
grammarTopics.description: sich lassen, sein + zu + Infinitiv, -bar adjectives and man as alternatives to the passive.

grammarTopics.title: Konnektoren & Konnektoradverbien (fortgeschritten)
grammarTopics.description: dennoch, folglich, gleichwohl, zumal, insofern, andernfalls, demzufolge, hingegen, mithin.

grammarTopics.title: Zweiteilige Konnektoren
grammarTopics.description: sowohl…als auch, weder…noch, je…desto, nicht nur…sondern auch, entweder…oder, zwar…aber.

grammarTopics.title: Genitivpräpositionen & Kohäsion
grammarTopics.description: angesichts, aufgrund, hinsichtlich, mittels, seitens, ungeachtet, zwecks, infolge; cohesive executive style.
